{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Valinhall power requirements
| introduced = City of Light
}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Using [[Valinhall]] power requires it to be re-forged into a new shape, a room, and a guardian.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c8">''City of Light'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate concepts]]
[[Category:Terminology]]
